title: Broadside v1.0
description: Broadcast-only ActivityPub server for organizations. Single Rust binary (axum), SQLite, fieldwork shared crate. Five build phases: fieldwork crate, core (schema/personas/posts/delivery), federation (signatures/webfinger/inbox/outbox), ingestion (RSS/webhook/dirwatch), hardening.
close_reason: All 15 implementation issues complete. .16 (fieldwork extraction) intentionally deferred. Broadside v1.0 MVP built.
